headline: This is MSI’s new Claw 8 EX AI Plus gaming handheld
summary: MSI unveiled the new Claw 8 EX AI Plus gaming handheld. It features Intel's new Arc G3 handheld processor. Set to be showcased at Computex 2026.

headline: Adobe’s conversational AI agent is a mediocre design intern
summary: Adobe introduced a new conversational AI image assistant. The tool aims to integrate AI into the creative design process. Review suggests it performs like a "mediocre design intern."

headline: Blue Origin explosion is a major setback for NASA’s Moon plans and Amazon’s Starlink competitor
summary: A Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded during a hot-fire test. This incident severely impacts NASA's Moon base timeline. Amazon's Leo space internet constellation also faces delays.

headline: Nintendo’s newest WarioWare is a weirdo smartphone app
summary: Nintendo launched a new WarioWare smartphone app called Pictonico. This marks a cautious return to mobile gaming for Nintendo. The app is described as unusual compared to past mobile efforts.

headline: New Xbox Boss Asham Sharma Reportedly Warns Staff 'Hard Choices' Are Ahead, but Insists Recent Game Pass Changes Are Helping
summary: New Xbox boss Asha Sharma reportedly warned staff of "hard choices." Microsoft aims to rebuild its gaming brand and boost revenue. Sharma claims recent Game Pass changes are proving beneficial.

headline: Magic: The Gathering's Marvel Super Heroes Jumpstart Booster Boxes Are Already 31% Off
summary: Magic: The Gathering Marvel Super Heroes Jumpstart boxes are discounted. Pre-orders are currently 31% off the retail price. Save on the new set before its official release.

headline: How 007 First Light Sets Up a Sequel
summary: The new game "007 First Light" has been released. Developer IO Interactive has laid groundwork for future Bond titles. The ending hints at a potential sequel for the franchise.

headline: Microsoft Responds to The Outer Worlds 'Free' Upgrade Confusion
summary: Obsidian apologized for confusion over "The Outer Worlds" upgrade. Players expected a free upgrade to Spacer's Choice Edition. Microsoft is addressing the community's concerns regarding the offer.

headline: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
summary: US officials confirm a ceasefire extension deal framework is near completion. The agreement awaits approval from President Trump and Iran's leadership. Vance states the two nations are "very close" but not fully there yet.

headline: Moment Blue Origin rocket explodes during test in Florida
summary: A Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded during a test. The incident occurred on a launch pad in Cape Canaveral, Florida. Video footage captured the moment of the spectacular explosion.

headline: SAS troops accused of war crimes not referred to police over morale fears, inquiry hears
summary: Inquiry reveals SAS war crime allegations were withheld from police. Concerns over troop morale prevented immediate referrals. Military police learned of extra-judicial killing claims years later.

headline: Top UK chefs call for 10% VAT cut for pubs and restaurants
summary: Leading UK chefs advocate for a 10% VAT cut for hospitality. Figures like Tom Kerridge and Yotam Ottolenghi support the measure. The proposed reduction aims to alleviate pressure on the industry.
